{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201752252FD4677042116A242DEF"}"},"total":396},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7516572643914335001","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的真的很好，算是我看教练文最好的一本书了，前期稍微有点毒不过作者很听读者的建议，后面质量直线拔高真的很不错，值得推荐的一本书[吃瓜]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1750096804,"group_id":"7379825508306930713","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4hkscUByBoxqr7fINZEDgSpHX3u2fMQLFzKxLbRxzW8","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/74847bd134df456cbb3c48aabf1285e3~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776536133&x-signature=%2FB62f6INCyZLaRTg5Nu04AqkDgk%3D","user_id":"1187093668181824","user_name":"文鉰"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1187093668181824","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1664059071,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7379825508306930713","book_info":{"abstract":"【词条+足球+执教+传奇】
【本书不完全走现实路线，介意勿入】

落魄的年轻人，快要降级的俱乐部。
没有人会觉得这样的搭配有多完美。
也没有人在乎，这里会发生怎样的故事。
直到，那个华夏年轻人的到来。
2017-18赛季末，李延青成为了伯顿竞技的主教练。
一段梦幻的旅程就此开始。
凭借能看见球员词条的能力，他让每个人都发挥出了最大的作用。
青训小将正在快速成长！
失意老将焕发出第二春！
对手：什么？我们的弃将又上演了帽子戏法？
经理：别这样，你这样显得我很没用......
老板：什么时候俱乐部里这么多明星球员了？
李延青：明星？不，这里只有一个明星，那就是我！
最后，这是段关于胜利，荣耀与骄傲的故事。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/58c5dbe70a6419b8467f9f4e532cfd9d~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"独孤离散","author_id":"","book_id":"7379825508306930713","book_name":"足球：我能看见球员词条","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#205810","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3200人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":15,"name":"体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=15&name=体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7379840625681648702","read_count":"3200","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1073891"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.3","serial_count":"526","tags":"游戏体育,体育","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/58c5dbe70a6419b8467f9f4e532cfd9d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779184345&x-signature=o2Bu5CZhztlXbxovjXxMbDGSKvY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"406"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201752252FD4677042116A242DEF"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读23小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":34489,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":81263,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1136},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7427587308098175768","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，不是纯靠金手指，大撒币靠预知买未来的巨星，而是靠自己的战术理解，系统辅助，主角对球队的指导一步步慢慢地成为大球队，也有挫折，也克服各种困难，这是一篇很真实的足球教练的成长文。","text_exts":[{"e":85,"s":81,"text":"足球教练","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%B6%B3%E7%90%83%E6%95%99%E7%BB%83&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317740003456A242DEF%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227427587308098175768%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227379825508306930713%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%B6%B3%E7%90%83%E6%95%99%E7%BB%83%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1729383326,"group_id":"7379825508306930713","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9KYOQMIT5JUGjac0mZmSk4=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"101800852703","user_name":"爱吃黄金虾饼的白瞳"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"101800852703","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7379825508306930713","book_info":{"abstract":"【词条+足球+执教+传奇】
